Birding with Eugene Booysen

Welcome to my website, at the moment there is not much going on here, but with the growth of my channel and my youtube channel subscribers, so will the website be joining that fate.

Let me introduce myself, my name is Eugene Booysen, I started birding a while back, and I would not recommend it.

I started birding in 2013, it was set ablaze when I did my FGASA field guide course, I've always been interested in birds, observing them, making my own names and enjoying their beauty.

But thanks to a good friend, he graved the path to one of the most rewarding hobbies you could ever have, once you pick up that book and succesfully identify your first bird, then you'll naturally want to identify another one.

Good luck!
